mentorAssignments.title: Mentor assignments
mentorAssignments.description: Assign users to mentors and keep active mentorship relationships clear.

deactivate.title: Deactivate assignment
deactivate.description: Deactivate the active assignment between {{user}} and {{mentor}}? This keeps the assignment history but removes it as the user's current mentor.

dialog.description: Choose a user and the mentor who should actively follow them.

form.userSearchPlaceholder: Search users by name or email

table.title: Active assignments
table.description: Only current active mentor assignments are shown here.

states.emptyDescription: Start by assigning a user to a mentor.
states.errorDescription: Refresh the data or try again in a moment.
states.selectUserFirst: Select a user first to load mentors in their region.
states.noMentorsInRegion: No mentors are available in this region.
states.saveError: Could not save the mentor assignment.
states.deactivateError: Could not deactivate the mentor assignment.

regions.title: Regions
regions.description: Create and manage the regions used to scope users, admins, and reporting.

dialog.description: Keep region names clear so user ownership and admin scope stay easy to understand.

deactivate.title: Deactivate region
deactivate.description: Deactivate {{name}}? This preserves history and hides the region from active workflows.

table.title: Region directory
table.description: Manage active and inactive regions from one place.
table.name: Name

states.emptyDescription: Create the first region to organize users and admins.
states.errorDescription: Refresh the data or try again in a moment.

errors.nameExists: A region with this name already exists.
errors.validation: Check the region details and try again.
errors.hasUsers: This region still has users and cannot be deleted. Move or deactivate its users first.

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage user access, regions, status, and active mentorship from one place.

dialog.description: Keep account details aligned with the user role and region scope.

deactivate.title: Deactivate user
deactivate.description: Deactivate {{name}}? They will no longer be able to use the application until reactivated.

reactivate.title: Reactivate user
reactivate.description: Reactivate {{name}} and restore access to the application.

transfer.title: Transfer region
transfer.description: Move {{name}} to another region. Use this only when ownership has actually changed.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Narrow users by scope, role, mentor, status, or search.
filters.search: Search users by name or email

table.title: User directory
table.description: A paginated view of users in your permitted scope.
table.name: Name

states.emptyDescription: Create a user or adjust the filters to see results.
states.errorDescription: Refresh the data or try again in a moment.

errors.emailInUse: This email address is already in use.
errors.validation: Check the user details and try again.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.statusChangeFailed: Could not update the user status.
errors.regionInvalid: The selected region is not valid.
errors.transferFailed: Could not transfer the user to this region.

worshipSchedule.title: Worship curriculum
worshipSchedule.description: Manage the worship curriculum that defines what users receive in their daily tracking flow. This is an admin configuration screen, not a personal tracking page.

dialog.description: Set points, input type, target value, day restrictions, and whether this item belongs to the user's curriculum.

categoryDialog.title: Add category
categoryDialog.description: Create a grouping for worship items, such as Fajr, Quran, or Friday actions.
categoryDialog.name: Category name

form.title: Item title
form.includeInDailySchedule: Include this item in the curriculum

table.title: Worship item directory
table.description: Configure worship items, scoring, targets, and curriculum inclusion from one place.

states.emptyDescription: Create the first item to build the worship curriculum.
states.errorDescription: Refresh the data or try again in a moment.

errors.saveFailed: Could not save the worship item.

worshipLevels.title: Worship levels
worshipLevels.description: Create and manage the worship levels that users can be assigned to and promoted through.

dialog.description: Set the level name, order, and description. Curriculum assignment is managed separately.

deactivate.title: Deactivate worship level
deactivate.description: Deactivate {{name}}? Users cannot be assigned to inactive levels.

assign.title: Assign {{level}}
assign.description: Choose the users who should follow this worship level. The previous active level will be closed automatically.
assign.searchPlaceholder: Search users by name or email
assign.error: Could not assign this worship level.

customize.title: Customize user worship schedule
customize.description: Add or remove worship items for one user without changing the base worship level.
customize.searchPlaceholder: Search users by name or email
customize.pickUserDescription: After selecting a user, you can add or remove items from their daily worship schedule.
customize.loadError: Could not load this user's worship schedule.
customize.emptySchedule: This user's schedule is currently empty.
customize.noAvailableItems: No more worship items are available to add.
customize.saveError: Could not save this user's worship schedule.

table.title: Level directory
table.description: Manage active and inactive worship levels from one place.
table.name: Name

states.emptyDescription: Create the first worship level to start assigning users.
states.errorDescription: Refresh the data or try again in a moment.

errors.nameExists: A worship level with this name already exists.
errors.orderExists: A worship level with this order already exists.
errors.validation: Check the level details and try again.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save the worship level.
errors.hasActiveUsers: This level still has {{count}} active users. Move users to another level before deactivating it.
errors.notFound: This worship level no longer exists.
errors.deactivateFailed: Could not deactivate this worship level.
